description_long: This object is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rounded bowl and an attached cistern at the rear. The toilet features a prominent, ribbed lid and a visible seat with a dark rim, contrasting against the lighter body. The cistern is rectangular with slightly beveled edges and a visible flush button on top. The bowl is deep and smoothly contoured, designed for comfortable seating and efficient waste collection. The base is broad and stable, ensuring the fixture remains securely in place. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of cleaning, making it suitable for public or residential urban environments.
description: A modern floor-mounted toilet with a ribbed lid, dark-rimmed seat, and rectangular cistern featuring a visible flush button. The design is sturdy and practical, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed lid, open seat, and deep bowl with the cistern visible at the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bowl, the seat, and the cistern with its flush button.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the cistern and the narrow profile of the toilet base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bowl, seat, and cistern, similar to the left but from the opposite angle.
